Water Slide Rentals in Nova Scotia

Nova Kingdom Rentals is Bridgewater-based and serves Nova Scotia water slide events by availability and travel quote, with splash-ready inflatables for summer birthdays, schools, and community celebrations.

Water-slide bookings require suitable power, water source, drainage, weather conditions, setup space, and confirmed availability before booking.

Featured Rentals

  • Crown Rush 42 - Large Inflatable, $450, Wet-use - Large 42ft water slide and obstacle course combo.
  • Crown Cascade - Water Slide, $319, Wet-use - Colourful water slide for splash-ready summer fun.
  • Crown Island Combo - Combo Inflatable, By quote, Wet-use - Tropical combo with bounce, slide, and splash/pool fun.

Best For

  • Summer birthdays
  • School fun days
  • Community events
  • Hot-weather parties

Frequently Asked Questions

Do water slides need water access?
Yes. Wet-use units require a water source, hose access, and safe drainage area. Water should be turned off at least 1 hour before pickup.
Is a water source required for water slides?
Yes. Water slides require a nearby water source and garden hose. The customer provides the water connection. Safe drainage and runoff area is required.
Are bookings confirmed after submitting an online request?
No. Submitting a request does not confirm your booking. Nova Kingdom Rentals confirms availability, travel cost, setup suitability, and deposit details before any booking is finalized.
What is the wind limit for inflatables?
Inflatables must not be used when sustained winds exceed 38 km/h. Use must stop immediately if winds reach or exceed this limit.
